fields.acceptance_criteria: Define a repeatable crane-cli verification path covering crate tests, production-like fixture coverage, and reviewed real dry-run metadata before future live imports.
fields.title: Verify crane-cli against controlled and real dry-run flows
fields.validation_plan: Run cargo test -p crane-cli, execute a real crane-cli --dry-run against the intended source and target repos, and confirm mappings, anchor, range, and branch metadata against the documented checklist.
